ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, social media, medical journal) */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment associated with the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who wrote the review */,
  "adr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ADR detected in the review */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer who wrote the review */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug being reviewed */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the review was approved */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_adr_id FOREIGN KEY ("adr_id") REFERENCES adrs ("adr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "medical_specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the reviewer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reviewer's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reviewer's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reviewer is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adrs" (
  "adr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ADR */,
  "adr_name" TEXT /* Name of the ADR */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ADR */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ADR was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ADR was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "influencer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the influencer */,
  "medical_specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the influencer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the influencer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the influencer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the influencer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the influencer's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the influencer's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the influencer is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being annotated */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation type */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who made the annotation */,
  "adr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ADR detected in the annotation */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment detected in the annotation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_type_id") REFERENCES annotation_types ("annotation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_adr_id FOREIGN KEY ("adr_id") REFERENCES adrs ("adr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_types" (
  "annotation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation type */,
  "annotation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_text" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the sentence belongs to */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the sentence */,
  "EF" INTEGER /* EF value of the sentence */,
  "INF" INTEGER /* INF value of the sentence */,
  "ADR" INTEGER /* ADR value of the sentence */,
  "DI" INTEGER /* DI value of the sentence */,
  "Finding" INTEGER /* Finding value of the sentence */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation made on the sentence */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who created the sentence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentence was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sentence is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_text_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_text_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
